problem_summary: Petals Hair & Beauty has built one of the strongest local reputations in Westport, with 312 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, but the current website is not structured to convert that trust into new bookings from organic search. Navigation issues, a hard-to-find contact form, and the absence of any blog or content section are limiting the site's ability to rank for local queries and guide new visitors toward a booking. A desktop PageSpeed score of 25 suggests additional technical factors may be affecting how search engines assess the site's quality signals.
recommended_solution: A focused Local SEO Starter package covering on-page SEO optimisation across key service pages, local business schema implementation and a dedicated location page, and a practical content plan tailored to Petals' services and the Westport market. Delivered in two defined phases to establish the technical foundation before introducing the content layer.
scope_of_work: On-page SEO review and optimisation of page titles, meta descriptions, and heading structure across core service pages, targeting local queries such as hairdresser Westport and hair salon Mayo.
Implementation of local business schema markup and creation of a dedicated location or area page to strengthen geographic relevance signals for Westport and surrounding areas.

Development of a simple content plan outlining three to six blog or update topics relevant to Petals' services and the local Westport audience, structured to be low-maintenance and support organic visibility growth over time.
expected_outcomes: Improved on-page SEO structure should improve the site's visibility for local and service-specific search queries in Westport and the wider Mayo area.
Local schema markup and a dedicated location page is likely to strengthen Google's understanding of the business's geographic relevance, supporting local search ranking over time.
A structured content plan reduces the need for the business to generate ideas from scratch and provides a clear, low-effort path to building organic search presence beyond the current static site.
next_steps: Schedule a 20-minute call to walk through the findings, confirm what is technically achievable within the current Phorest setup, and agree on the scope before moving forward.
risks_if_delayed: Each month without on-page SEO optimisation and local schema in place is time during which new visitors searching for a salon in Westport are less likely to find Petals organically, leaving the business reliant on word of mouth and existing channels to fill the appointment book. The strong review profile already in place represents a significant trust asset that a structured site could be converting more consistently.
